meanings.definition: arrange or fold as a cover or protection
examples: wrap the baby before taking her out
roll your hair around your finger
Twine the thread around the spool
She wrapped her arms around the child

meanings.definition: enclose or enfold completely with or as if with a covering
crash into so as to coil around
examples: The teenager wrapped his car around the fire hydrant

meanings.definition: covered with or as if with clothes or a wrap or cloak
giving or marked by complete attention to; ; ; - Walter de la Mare
examples: that engrossed look or rapt delight
so intent on this fantastic...narrative that she hardly stirred

meanings.definition: enclosed securely in a covering of paper or the like
